headline: A Look At Southern Company’s Valuation As Greener Life Carbon Offset Milestone Draws Attention
summary: Greener Life milestone puts Southern’s sustainability efforts in focus Southern (SO) is back in the spotlight after subsidiary Georgia Natural Gas said its Greener Life program has offset more than 1 billion pounds of carbon emissions, making participating customers’ natural gas usage carbon neutral. The milestone highlights how Southern’s utility and gas operations connect to emissions reduction efforts, and gives investors another data point to weigh alongside the company’s...
